title: Battle of Cato Neimoidia (disambiguation)
content:
'''Battle of Cato Neimoidia''' may refer to:

==Canon==
*'''[[Conquest of Cato Neimoidia]]''', in which the [[Galactic Republic]] took the [[planet]] from the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems]].
*'''[[Defense of Cato Neimoidia]]''', known also as the '''Battle of Cato Neimoidia''', in which [[Anakin Skywalker]] and [[Ahsoka Tano]] responded to a Separatist invasion of [[Cato Neimoidia]].
*'''[[Assault on Cato Neimoidia]]'''
*'''[[Battle of Cato Neimoidia]]''', in which [[Plo Koon]] helped recapture Cato Neimoidia from the Confederacy, only to be killed with the issuance of [[Order 66]].

==Legends==
*[[Defense of Cato Neimoidia/Legends|Defense of Cato Neimoidia]], in which [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] and [[Ahsoka Tano/Legends|Ahsoka Tano]] responded to a [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] invasion of [[Cato Neimoidia/Legends|Cato Neimoidia]].
*[[Siege of Cato Neimoidia|Battle of Cato Neimoidia]], in which Anakin Skywalker and [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] attempted to capture [[Viceroy of the Trade Federation]] [[Nute Gunray/Legends|Nute Gunray]].
*[[Battle of Cato Neimoidia/Legends|Second battle of Cato Neimoidia]], in which [[Plo Koon/Legends|Plo Koon]] was killed with the issuance of [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]].

{{Disambig}}
